name: ComboboxRoot
description: Root controller for an autocomplete combobox. Combines text input with dropdown listbox.
whenToUse: Searchable/filterable selection from many options (search, tagging, autocomplete).
avoidWhen: Few options without search - use Select. Free text - use Input.
accessibilityRequirements: label is required. Input has role='combobox' with aria-autocomplete.

label.description: Accessible label for the combobox - required.

parts.name: ComboboxInput
parts.description: Text input for the Combobox with autocomplete.

parts.name: ComboboxEmpty
parts.description: Empty state shown when no Combobox items match.

parts.name: ComboboxGroup
parts.description: Groups related combobox options with an optional heading.
parts.whenToUse: Inside ComboboxContent to organize larger option sets.

parts.name: ComboboxSeparator
parts.description: Visual separator between combobox groups or sections.

examples.title: Searchable Dropdown
